mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT tag FROM article, JSON_TABLE( tags, '$[*]' COLUMNS (tag VARCHAR(100) PATH '$') ) AS jt WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY tag
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS count FROM article WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month DESC
